description: Checks whether preferences from different counterparties remain separated.

timeline.user: When you summarize measurements for me, use metric units and keep it concise.
For my reports, use imperial units and explain the details.

timeline.query: Summarize the room dimensions for me.

evaluation.scoring_rubric: The answer should apply Alice's preferences, not Bob's.

expected_memories.description: Alice prefers metric units and concise summaries.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "alice metric concise measurement preference" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10

expected_memories.description: Bob's imperial preference should not be applied to Alice.

probe.command: FIND(?pref) WHERE { ?person {type: "Person", name: "alice"} ?link (?person, "prefers", ?pref) FILTER(CONTAINS(?pref.name, "imperial") || CONTAINS(?pref.attributes.description, "imperial")) } LIMIT 10
